whatIDo.name: Language
whatIDo.detail: Proficient in Ruby, with hands-on experience in building scalable backend systems. Comfortable writing efficient and maintainable code, and understanding object-oriented principles in Ruby. Intermediate experience in other languages like JavaScript for Node.js-based backend development.

whatIDo.name: Frameworks
whatIDo.detail: Experienced in Ruby on Rails, using it to develop full-stack web applications with a focus on speed and efficiency. Have also worked with REST APIs for seamless integration and communication between systems.

whatIDo.name: Database
whatIDo.detail: Comfortable working with relational databases like PostgreSQL. Have built database schemas, optimized queries, and handled migrations. Experience with Firebase as a NoSQL database for certain projects where real-time syncing and scaling were important.

whatIDo.name: Ability
whatIDo.detail: Confident in building and maintaining APIs, server-side logic, and database-driven applications. Able to integrate third-party services and manage cloud-based deployments. Capable of handling user authentication, authorization, and session management in production environments.
